query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: Dark silhouettes of leafy branches and tall plants frame a misty lakeside view where a bright sun glows through dense fog in a pale sky; a low bridge spans the middle of the calm water, with dark treelines and bare trees on the far shore softened by haze and reflected in the still surface below.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Dark silhouettes of leafy branches and tall plants frame an oppressive, mist-choked lakeside view bathed in a sickly yellow-green color cast, where muted, faded tones and crushed contrast create a suffocating atmosphere; a bright sun bleaches through heavy fog above a low bridge and dark distant treelines, their forms dissolved in the melancholic haze and faintly reflected in the still water below.
